description: MORIE Toolkit: Multi-domain Open Research and Inferential Estimation - dual-language (Python + R) toolkit hosting the MRM (McNamara-Ruhela-Medina) framework. Renamed from MOIRAIS in v0.1.3. Software DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20111233.
Deprecated alias for the morie package. The toolkit was renamed from MOIRAIS to MORIE in v0.1.3; this shim depends on morie and exists only for backwards compatibility.
